title: Eating Animations x Farmer's Delight Add-ons
description: Add compatibility between Eating Animations and the food of the mod Farmer's Delight and variants of some other Farmer's Delight Add-ons theme mod
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility (FORGE/FABRIC)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-more-mod-compatibility) ### Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility **Add compatibility for mods with [Eating animation(FORGE/FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** ### Mod Compatibility & Fixes: - [**Aether Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aethers-delight) - [**Artifacts Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts-delight) - **Born in Chaos Delight** (from [**Compat Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/compat-delight)) - [**Ender's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enders-delight) - [**Farmer´s Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - [**Mineral Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mineral-delight-port) - [**Nether´s Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight) & [**Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight-refabricated) - [**Ocean´s Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight) - [**Quark Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-delight) - [**Twilight's Flavor & Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-delight) [_(Combine with Eating Animations+)_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) ![i](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ab4b00a14fb926747e706d96f939a844dbad86.png)
